instruction: Add a note titled {TARGET} to your notes store, without altering any existing note.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity, §7 WAL checkpoint). Tier-B sqlite read of a notes-style store; the runner checkpoints the WAL before reading. AndroidWorld validate_rows_addition_integrity ported to Notes — clearing the store and adding only the target scores 0.

args: rm -rf "$HOME/.guibench/notesdb"; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench/notesdb" "$HOME/.guibench"; DB="$HOME/.guibench/notesdb/{STORE}"; sqlite3 "$DB" 'CREATE TABLE notes(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT);'; sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO notes(id,title) VALUES(1,'Welcome'),(2,'Scratch');"; sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT id||'|'||title FROM notes ORDER BY id" > "$HOME/.guibench/{STORE}.before"

result.query: SELECT id||'|'||title FROM notes ORDER BY id;
